name: Speedy Cash
description_short: At 6838 Stage Rd in Bartlett, TN, Speedy Cash offers quick payday and title loans with convenient hours.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is located at 6838 Stage Rd in Bartlett, TN, in a standalone storefront in the heart of the community. The location is easily accessible for residents of Bartlett and surrounding areas who need quick financial solutions. The store is open Monday and Friday 9AM-7PM, Tuesday-Thursday 9AM-6PM, and Saturday 9AM-4PM, with Sunday closures.

This Bartlett, TN location specializes in payday loans and title-secured loans, providing same-day or next-day funding for eligible customers. The staff at the 6838 Stage Rd branch can explain loan options, help with the application process, and answer questions about terms and fees. Customers can call +1 901-373-3232 to speak with a representative about available loans.

If you're a Bartlett resident facing unexpected expenses or cash flow gaps, this Speedy Cash location can help bridge the gap quickly. Bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a bank account when you visit the Stage Rd storefront. The store is designed for fast processing to get you the funds you need when you need them.
pros: Three loan products at one location: payday loans, line of credit, and title loans
Line of credit goes up to $4,000 with revolving access as the balance is repaid
Title loans up to $4,000 available to borrowers who own a clear-title vehicle
In-store staff assist throughout the application, document signing, and funding process
Also offers check cashing, money orders, and wire transfers — useful for unbanked customers
Green Dot Visa Debit Card available in-store for customers without a bank account
Extended weekday hours (until 7pm Mon and Fri) and Saturday access until 4pm
cons: Payday loan maximum is $425 — lower than many short-term lenders in Tennessee
Title loans require the vehicle to be brought in-store for appraisal — no remote or online option
Closed Sundays, which limits access for true weekend emergencies
Payday and title loans carry high APRs typical of short-term lending — costs are not disclosed on the store page
No mention of credit bureau reporting, so loan repayment will not build the borrower's credit history
best_for: Tennessee consumers who need up to $425 quickly and have verifiable income but limited savings
Vehicle owners who need more than a payday loan and can offer a clear-title car as collateral
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need check cashing, a prepaid card, or wire transfers alongside a loan
Borrowers who prefer in-person assistance when applying for or signing short-term loan documents
diagnosis: Speedy Cash at this Memphis location is best suited for Tennessee consumers who need small, fast loans and prefer face-to-face service over online-only lenders. The $425 payday loan cap limits its utility for larger short-term needs, though the $4,000 line of credit and title loan options serve qualifying borrowers with bigger gaps. As with all payday and title lenders, costs are high — exhaust lower-cost alternatives before applying.
services: Revolving Line of Credit up to $4,000
In-store loan application and document signing assistance
meta_description: Speedy Cash at 6838 Stage Rd, Bartlett, TN. Same-day payday and title loans.
